description: In Swift, validate the Codable decoding, actor isolation, and Objective-C interop bridging where external data crosses in.
body: In Swift, defects cluster at Codable decoding, actor isolation, and Objective-C interop bridging, where assumptions about types, ownership, or encoding stop holding. Use when a change crosses public API, optional vs non-optional signatures, and protocol requirements or consumes data from outside the program. Do not assume the other side honors your contract, and avoid trusting input without checking it. Actions: identify the boundary, test both valid and malformed input, verify the error path, and record the assumptions you are relying on. Validation signals include tests for the failure path, a trace of rejected input, and a documented contract at public API, optional vs non-optional signatures, and protocol requirements. Risk boundary: escalate when the boundary handles untrusted input, crosses a trust/security line, or feeds a system you cannot roll back.
